purpose: Interview concept test — not generated by production pipeline

trend.name: Soft Gold Chrome
trend.description: Milky nude base with brushed gold chrome on almond or coffin shapes. Clean, luminous, office-friendly with weekend glam appeal.

suggested_post.caption:
Soft gold chrome is the quiet luxury look clients are asking for right now ✨

Milky base, brushed metal finish, clean almond shape — perfect when you want shine without loud art.

📍 [Your salon name]
📞 Book via DM or link in bio

#chromenails #nailinspo #almondnails #cleangirl #nailartvietnam
suggested_post.caption_vi:
Chrome vàng mềm đang là lựa chọn sang nhẹ mà khách thích nhất dạo này ✨

Nền sữa, hiệu ứng kim loại brushed, form almond gọn — đẹp mà không quá cầu kỳ.

📍 [Tên tiệm]
📞 Inbox hoặc link bio để đặt lịch
suggested_post.posting_tip: Use a photo of your latest chrome set in natural light. Post between 11am–1pm or 7–9pm local time for best reach.
suggested_post.cta: Book your chrome refresh this week

interview_prompts: Would you publish this caption with your own nail photo?
What would you change before posting?
Is the Vietnamese caption useful for your audience?
Rate 1-5: likelihood to use AI-assisted captions like this
